title: pacs008-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for the pacs008 ISO 20022 FI-to-FI Customer Credit Transfer library. Exposes tools for generating, validating, and parsing pacs.008 payment messages, scheme-profile (CBPR+, HVPS+, Fedwire, CHAPS, T2 RTGS, SCT Inst) rule introspection and validation, and XSD-based XML validation. Part of the ISO 20022 MCP Suite.
